title: Lattice-Based Encryption: Kyber (ML-KEM) Deep Dive
description: Master the NIST-standardized ML-KEM (Kyber) algorithm. Understand its construction from Module-LWE, key encapsulation mechanics, IND-CCA2 security, and practical implementation considerations.
learningObjectives: Explain Kyber's complete construction from Module-LWE
Implement the core Kyber algorithms (KeyGen, Encaps, Decaps)
Analyze Kyber's parameter choices and security levels
Compare Kyber to classical key exchange mechanisms
Identify implementation pitfalls and best practices
